ddls:
CREATE TABLE "astronomical_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each astronomical object */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the object in solar masses */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the object in billions of years */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the object in Kelvin */,
  "gravity" REAL /* Gravity of the object in m/s² */,
  "luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the object in solar units */,
  "Mv" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in V band */,
  "Mr" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in R band */,
  "Mi" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in I band */,
  "Mj" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in J band */,
  "Mh" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in H band */,
  "Mk" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in K band */,
  "Ml" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in L band */,
  "Mm" REAL /* Absolute magnitude in M band */,
  "metallicity" INTEGER /* Metallicity of the object */,
  "cloud" TEXT /* Cloud classification */,
  "y" REAL /* Y value for additional property analysis */,
  "l_mix" INTEGER /* L mix value for additional property analysis */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the astronomical object (e.g., star, galaxy) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the object in parsecs */,
  "right_ascension" REAL /* Right ascension of the object in hours */,
  "declination" REAL /* Declination of the object in degrees */,
  "galactic_longitude" REAL /* Galactic longitude of the object in degrees */,
  "galactic_latitude" REAL /* Galactic latitude of the object in degrees */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observing_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observing session */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the astronomical object being observed */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer conducting the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the observing session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in hours */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., imaging, spectroscopy) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observing_sessions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES astronomical_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or organization */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., galaxy evolution, stellar astronomy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object related to the dataset */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observing session during which data was collected */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  "readme_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the readme file containing information about the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, FITS) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES observing_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES astronomical_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the dataset (e.g., laptop, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the astronomical object this metadata is related to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata entry */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metadata value (e.g., km/s, K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES astronomical_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead observer */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-author, advisor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id")
)
